project.name: frappe-desk-ui-wasm
project.system_context: Single-page user interface application running in WASM inside the web browser. Target Stack: Dioxus 0.7.9, rust_decimal = "=1.42.0", web-sys, wasm-bindgen, gloo-timers.
project.directory_structure: frappe-desk-ui/ ├── Cargo.toml ├── Dioxus.toml └── crates/ ├── desk-app/ # App shell entry and routing transitions │ └── src/ │ ├── main.rs │ ├── state.rs │ └── router.rs └── desk-components/ # Layout templates, fields, interpret renderer, and SSE └── src/ ├── lib.rs ├── state.rs ├── sse.rs ├── layout/ │ ├── navbar.rs │ └── sidebar.rs └── form_engine/ ├── interpreter.rs └── fields.rs

key_invariants.invariant: State uses modern signal primitives: active_site, current_user, open_tabs. Updates must mutate state reactively via Signal::set or Signal::write.
FormInterpreter dynamically reads LocalDocTypeSchema rows, rendering autocomplete LinkFields and Decimal-formatted CurrencyFields asynchronously.
The SSE listener runs ConnectEventStream, updating signals on incoming updates. Closures are explicitly forgotten to prevent browser garbage collection.
